column1: # Required | A unique content ID for the item. Use the item's SKU if you can. Each content ID must appear only once in your catalog. To run dynamic ads this ID must exactly match the content ID for the same item in your Meta Pixel code. Character limit: 100
column2: # Required | A specific and relevant title for the item. See title specifications: https://www.facebook.com/business/help/2104231189874655 Character limit: 200
column3: # Required | A short and relevant description of the item. Include specific or unique product features like material or color. Use plain text and don't enter text in all capital letters. See description specifications: https://www.facebook.com/business/help/2302017289821154 Character limit: 9999
column4: # Required | The current availability of the item. | Supported values: in stock; out of stock
column5: # Required | The current condition of the item. | Supported values: new; used
column6: # Required | The price of the item. Format the price as a number followed by the 3-letter currency code (ISO 4217 standards). Use a period (.) as the decimal point; don't use a comma.
column7: # Required | The URL of the specific product page where people can buy the item.
column8: # Required | The URL for the main image of your item. Images must be in a supported format (JPG/GIF/PNG) and at least 500 x 500 pixels.
column9: # Required | The brand name of the item. Character limit: 100.
column10: # Optional | The Google product category for the item. Learn more about product categories: https://www.facebook.com/business/help/526764014610932.
column11: # Optional | The Facebook product category for the item. Learn more about product categories: https://www.facebook.com/business/help/526764014610932.
column12: # Optional | The quantity of this item you have to sell on Facebook and Instagram with checkout. Must be 1 or higher or the item won't be buyable
column13: # Optional | The discounted price of the item if it's on sale. Format the price as a number followed by the 3-letter currency code (ISO 4217 standards). Use a period (.) as the decimal point; don't use a comma. A sale price is required if you want to use an overlay for discounted prices.
column14: # Optional | The time range for your sale period. Includes the date and time/time zone when your sale starts and ends. If this field is blank any items with a sale_price remain on sale until you remove the sale price. Use this format: YYYY-MM-DDT23:59+00:00/YYYY-MM-DDT23:59+00:00. Enter the start date as YYYY-MM-DD. Enter a 'T'. Enter the start time in 24-hour format (00:00 to 23:59) followed by the UTC time zone (-12:00 to +14:00). Enter '/' and then repeat the same format for your end date and time. The example row below uses PST time zone (-08:00).
column15: # Optional | Use this field to create variants of the same item. Enter the same group ID for all variants within a group. Learn more about variants: https://www.facebook.com/business/help/2256580051262113 Character limit: 100.
column16: # Optional | The gender of a person that the item is targeted towards. | Supported values: female; male; unisex
column17: # Optional | The color of the item. Use one or more words to describe the color. Don't use a hex code. Character limit: 200.
column18: # Optional | The size of the item written as a word or abbreviation or number. For example: small; XL; 12. Character limit: 200.
column19: # Optional | The age group that the item is targeted towards. | Supported values: adult; all ages; infant; kids; newborn; teen; toddler
column20: # Optional | The material the item is made from; such as cotton; denim or leather. Character limit: 200.
column21: # Optional | The pattern or graphic print on the item. Character limit: 100.
column22: # Optional | Shipping details for the item. Format as Country:Region:Service:Price. Include the 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code in the price. Enter the price as 0.0 to use the free shipping overlay in your ads. Use a semi-colon ';' or a comma ";" to separate multiple shipping details for different regions or countries. Only people in the specified region or country will see shipping details for that region or country. You can leave out the region (keep the double '::') if your shipping details are the same for an entire country.
column23: # Optional | The shipping weight of the item. Include the unit of measurement (lb/oz/g/kg).
column24: # Optional | The URL for a video of your product. Link should be a videos file on a file hosting website; not a video player. Videos must be in a supported format (.3g2; .3gp; .3gpp; .asf; .avi; .dat; .divx; .dv; .f4v; .flv; .gif; .m2ts; .m4v; .mkv; .mod; .mov; .mp4; .mpe; .mpeg; .mpeg4; .mpg; .mts; .nsv; .ogm; .ogv; .qt; .tod; .ts; .vob or .wmv).
column25: # Optional | The URL for a video of your product. Link should be a videos file on a file hosting website; not a video player. Videos must be in a supported format (.3g2; .3gp; .3gpp; .asf; .avi; .dat; .divx; .dv; .f4v; .flv; .gif; .m2ts; .m4v; .mkv; .mod; .mov; .mp4; .mpe; .mpeg; .mpeg4; .mpg; .mts; .nsv; .ogm; .ogv; .qt; .tod; .ts; .vob or .wmv)..1
column26: # Optional | The item’s Global Trade Item Number (GTIN). Recommended to help classify the item. May appear on the barcode; packaging or book cover. Only provide GTIN if you’re sure it’s correct. GTIN types include UPC (12 digits); EAN (13 digits); JAN (8 or 13 digits); ISBN (13 digits) or ITF-14 (14 digits)
column27: # Optional | Add labels to products to help filter them into product sets. Max characters: 110 per label; 5000 labels per product
column28: # Optional | Add labels to products to help filter them into product sets. Max characters: 110 per label; 5000 labels per product.1
column29: # Optional | Describe the fashion style of this item.

column2: Wall Mounted Chin Up Pull Up Bar
column3:
Build upper body strength and core stability with this sturdy and versatile Dips Bar — designed for home and gym workouts. Crafted from high-grade steel tubing, it provides stability for exercises like dips, push-ups, L-sits, knee raises, and inverted rows. Its non-slip rubber feet ensure safety and floor protection,  grips offer maximum comfort during intense training sessions. Perfect for athletes, calisthenics enthusiasts, or anyone looking to enhance their workout routine.
Material: Heavy-duty steel frame with powder-coated finish
Load Capacity: Supports up to 150–200 kg (varies by model)
Adjustable Height: Allows customization for multiple exercises
Compact & Portable: Easy to move and store — ideal for home gyms
Non-Slip Base: Rubber feet keep the bar stable and prevent floor damage
Versatile Use: Perfect for dips, leg raises, push-ups, L-sits, and bodyweight rows
Assembly: Quick

Constructed from quality rubber wood, this push up stands offers sturdy weight bearing capacity and a long lifespan, ensuring reliable support during workouts

[Anti Slip]: The rubber wood material provides a non slip grip and comfortable handling, enhancing security during exercises

[Versatile Use]: Versatile design allows for use in various exercises such as push ups, Russian dips, parallel bars, and handstands to cater to diverse fitness needs
